basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent in Robotics, or allied fields
qualification.details: Ph.D. or equivalent in Robotics, or allied fields. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Scientist-I recruitment is 22-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Robotics or allied fields. Additionally, a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Scientist-I post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 93,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Scientist-I job?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website. The application link and further instructions are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Scientist-I post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Scientist-I position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is SPON/10082/Adv/1234 DATED 16.06.2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Offline applications will not be accepted.
